name: Transit ingress fixture slot
purpose: Reserve schema for externally verified planet ingress dates before public gochar activation.
source_note: Expected values must be filled from Swiss Ephemeris or another trusted ephemeris source before this fixture can be marked verified_external.

name: Transit retrograde fixture slot
